name: Blueberry Crisp
recipeInstructions: Crust: Melt the ingredients together. Pack the mixture into a loaf pan, 9x13 inches. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes. Let it cool. Mix the filling ingredients and spread them over the cooled crust. Spread the pie filling on top, to your desired thickness. Chill the dessert several hours before serving.
